center.name: 西部省 (肯尼亚)
center.summary: 西部省 (肯尼亚)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Northern brown-throated weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Uganda, Rwanda and adjacent northern Burundi, eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, western Kenya and northwestern Tanzania

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Uganda, Rwanda and adjacent northern Burundi, eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, western Kenya and northwestern Tanzania
